name: openrouter-mcp
description: Discover OpenRouter models and generate, edit, and describe images from Claude.
long_description: A single Rust binary that exposes OpenRouter to Claude over MCP. Discover models with their capabilities and pricing, generate and edit images (with parallel seed-stepped variants and a sidecar manifest), describe local images with a vision model, and track per-process usage. Bring your own OpenRouter API key.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available OpenRouter models with capabilities and pricing; filter and sort server-side.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate or edit an image with an OpenRouter image model and save it to disk (supports parallel variants).

tools.name: get_result
tools.description: Fetch the status and result of a generation job by task_id.

tools.name: describe_image
tools.description: Describe or answer questions about local image(s) with a vision-capable model.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Return info about the OpenRouter API key in use: label, credit usage, limits, and tier.

tools.name: get_usage_stats
tools.description: Return in-memory usage statistics for this server process.

tools.name: reset_usage_stats
tools.description: Reset all in-memory usage statistics to zero (requires confirm=true).

api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
api_key.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Create one at https://openrouter.ai/keys
